steps.title: Connect Trèfle to rural life
steps.content: The student wants to explain why a Prairial day was named Trèfle, meaning clover. The relevant notes say each day was named after a plant, animal, tool, or mineral to honor rural life.

steps.title: Reject background without cause
steps.content: A says the month had ten-day weeks and a day named Trèfle, but gives no reason. B gives calendar background. D states when the naming happened without explaining the naming principle. The answer is C.
